'''ngomadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:elasmoid|elasmoid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-m-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:elasmoid|elasmoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngomadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngomadithi|ngomadithi]] || [[word:ngomadiji|ngomadiji]] || [[word:ngomadishi|ngomadishi]] || [[word:ngomadiki|ngomadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngomaduthuthu|ngomaduthuthu]] || [[word:ngomadujuju|ngomadujuju]] || [[word:ngomadushushu|ngomadushushu]] || [[word:ngomadukuku|ngomadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngomaduthu|ngomaduthu]] || [[word:ngomaduju|ngomaduju]] || [[word:ngomadushu|ngomadushu]] || [[word:ngomaduku|ngomaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngomadufthuf|ngomadufthuf]] || [[word:ngomadufjuf|ngomadufjuf]] || [[word:ngomadufshuf|ngomadufshuf]] || [[word:ngomadufkuf|ngomadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngomadethe|ngomadethe]] || [[word:ngomadeje|ngomadeje]] || [[word:ngomadeshe|ngomadeshe]] || [[word:ngomadeke|ngomadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngomadothotho|ngomadothotho]] || [[word:ngomadojojo|ngomadojojo]] || [[word:ngomadoshosho|ngomadoshosho]] || [[word:ngomadokoko|ngomadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngomadotho|ngomadotho]] || [[word:ngomadojo|ngomadojo]] || [[word:ngomadosho|ngomadosho]] || [[word:ngomadoko|ngomadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngomadofthof|ngomadofthof]] || [[word:ngomadofjof|ngomadofjof]] || [[word:ngomadofshof|ngomadofshof]] || [[word:ngomadofkof|ngomadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfthĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfjĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfshĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfkĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfthĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfjĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfshĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfkĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfthĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfjĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfshĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadĂŻfkĂŻf|ngomadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngomadĂŠthĂŠ|ngomadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngomadĂŠjĂŠ|ngomadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngomadĂŠshĂŠ|ngomadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngomadĂŠkĂŠ|ngomadĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngomadathatha|ngomadathatha]] || [[word:ngomadajaja|ngomadajaja]] || [[word:ngomadashasha|ngomadashasha]] || [[word:ngomadakaka|ngomadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngomadatha|ngomadatha]] || [[word:ngomadaja|ngomadaja]] || [[word:ngomadasha|ngomadasha]] || [[word:ngomadaka|ngomadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngomadafthaf|ngomadafthaf]] || [[word:ngomadafjaf|ngomadafjaf]] || [[word:ngomadafshaf|ngomadafshaf]] || [[word:ngomadafkaf|ngomadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngomadasha|ngomadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngomadshĂ«asha|ngomadshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngomadroasha|ngomadroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngomadmuasha|ngomadmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngomadyaasha|ngomadyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongomadnkshĂ«asha|gongomadnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongomadnkroasha|gongomadnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongomadnkmuasha|gongomadnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongomadnkyaasha|gongomadnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngomamadasha|ngomamadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngomamadshĂ«asha|ngomamadshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngomamadroasha|ngomamadroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngomamadmuasha|ngomamadmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngomamadyaasha|ngomamadyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongomamadnkshĂ«asha|gongomamadnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongomamadnkroasha|gongomamadnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongomamadnkmuasha|gongomamadnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongomamadnkyaasha|gongomamadnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngemĂŠdasha|ngemĂŠdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngemĂŠdshĂ«asha|ngemĂŠdshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngemĂŠdroasha|ngemĂŠdroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngemĂŠdmuasha|ngemĂŠdmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngemĂŠdyaasha|ngemĂŠdyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongemĂŠdnkshĂ«asha|gongemĂŠdnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongemĂŠdnkroasha|gongemĂŠdnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongemĂŠdnkmuasha|gongemĂŠdnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongemĂŠdnkyaasha|gongemĂŠdnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngomfadasha|ngomfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngomfadshĂ«asha|ngomfadshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngomfadroasha|ngomfadroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngomfadmuasha|ngomfadmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngomfadyaasha|ngomfadyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongomfadnkshĂ«asha|gongomfadnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongomfadnkroasha|gongomfadnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongomfadnkmuasha|gongomfadnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongomfadnkyaasha|gongomfadnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
